steps.description: Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" item in the Explorer sidebar of Visual Studio Code to select the workspace folder.
Click the "Create a New Agent/App" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the "New Project" dialog to create an agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "No Action" option in the "Add an action to your declarative agent" dropdown within the "Create Declarative Agent" modal in Microsoft Visual Studio Code (Agents Toolkit extension).
Click the "Default folder" option in the workspace folder selection dropdown within Visual Studio Code to select the directory "/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects".
Type 'testapp' into the 'Application Name' input field at the top of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit home screen in Visual Studio Code.
Press Enter to confirm the "testapp" input in the "Application Name" dialog within Visual Studio Code.
